zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Harding III於1750年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫時，他的父親Henry Harding II36歲，母親Wilmouth George29歲。他於1776年2月13日與Rebecca Netherton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1796年11月4日之前在美國肯塔基州謝佛遜，埋葬在美國肯塔基州奧爾德姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Harding III于1750年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫时，他的父亲Henry Harding II36岁，母亲Wilmouth George29岁。他于1776年2月13日与Rebecca Netherton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1796年11月4日之前在美国肯塔基州謝佛遜，埋葬在美国肯塔基州奧爾德姆。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.description: "Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The Making of the U.S. Constitution.
historicEvents.description: The Philadelphia Convention was intended to be the first meeting to establish the first system of government under the Articles of Confederation. From this Convention, the Constitution of the United States was made and then put into place making it one of the major events in all American History.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 15th State
historicEvents.description: On June 1, 1792, Kentucky became the 15th state. It was the first state west of the Appalachian Mountains

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Harding III was born in 1750, in Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Henry Harding II, was 36 and his mother, Wilmouth George, was 29. He married Rebecca Netherton on 13 February 1776, in Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 4 November 1796, in Jefferson, Kentucky, United States, and was buried in Oldham, Kentucky, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Harding III est né en 1750, à Dunmore, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Harding II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Wilmouth George, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Netherton le 13 février 1776, à Dunmore, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 4 novembre 1796, à Jefferson, Kentucky, États-Unis, et a été enterré à Oldham, Kentucky, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Harding III 1750 in Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Harding II 36 und seine Mutter Wilmouth George 29. Er hat am 13. Februar 1776 in Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America Rebecca Netherton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 4. November 1796 in Jefferson, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Oldham, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Harding III è nato il nel 1750 nel Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Henry Harding II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Wilmouth George, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Netherton il 13 febbraio 1776, nel Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 4 novembre 1796, nel Jefferson, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America, e fu sepolto a Oldham, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Harding IIIが1750年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ダンモーで生まれた時，父Henry Harding IIは36歳，母Wilmouth Georgeは29歳であった。1776年2月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ダンモーでRebecca Nethertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1796年11月4日以前にアメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州ジェフエルソンで死去し，アメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州オルドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Harding III(이)가 1750년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Harding II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Wilmouth George(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1776년 2월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어에서 Rebecca Netherton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1796년 11월 4일 이전 미국 켄터키 주 제퍼슨에서 사망했으며 미국 켄터키 주 드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Harding III nasceu em 1750, em Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Harding II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Wilmouth George, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Netherton em 13 de fevereiro de 1776, em Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 4 de novembro de 1796, em Jefferson, Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América, e foi sepultado em Oldham, Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Harding III родился в 1750 г. в местности дунмор, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Henry Harding II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Wilmouth George, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Netherton 13 февраля 1776 г. в местности дунмор, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 4 ноябрь 1796 г. в местности джеффирсон, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты и был похоронен в местности олдхам, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты.
